entries.behavior: Keeps createUploader and createUppyUploader available from the core root entry.
Accepts one insertKeys object or an array, with keys as a string or an array.
entries.migration: Use an array of insertKeys entries and an array for each keys value.

entries.behavior: Accepts move(distance, reverse) in addition to Slate MoveOptions.
Normalizes historical font, code, todo and indent HTML before parsing.
entries.migration: Keep historical HTML readable and preserve values through round trips.

entries.behavior: Normalizes numbered-list and bulleted-list nodes created by older editors.
entries.migration: Normalize loaded documents to the current list-item model without losing content.

entries.behavior: Accepts the historical array form of a successful upload response.
entries.migration: Backends should return one data object; existing array responses remain supported.

entries.behavior: Normalizes historical iframe and video attributes before parsing.
entries.migration: Keep historical video HTML readable and preserve media attributes.

entries.behavior: Normalizes historical table structure, widths and alignment before parsing.
entries.migration: Keep historical table HTML readable and verify width and alignment round trips.

entries.behavior: Provides globalThis and AggregateError fallbacks for supported browser environments.
entries.migration: Raise and publish the browser support baseline before removing fallbacks.

entries.behavior: Provides minimal browser globals when the editor is imported in Node or SSR.
entries.migration: Define the SSR import contract and verify supported frameworks before removal.

entries.behavior: Uses keydown and keypress when beforeinput is absent or incomplete.
entries.migration: Raise the browser support baseline and verify IME behavior before removal.
